ignoreCommand: bash -c 'if [ -n "$VERCEL_GIT_PULL_REQUEST_ID" ]; then exit 0; fi; if [ "$VERCEL_ENV" = "production" ]; then git diff --name-only HEAD^ HEAD 2>/dev/null | grep -qE "^(app/|components/|lib/|public/|package\.json|package-lock\.json|next\.config|tailwind\.config|postcss\.config|tsconfig|middleware\.|eslint\.config)" && exit 1 || exit 0; fi; exit 0'
